headline: Winners And Losers Of Q1: Fortive (NYSE:FTV) Vs The Rest Of The Professional Tools and Equipment Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at professional tools and equipment stocks, starting with Fortive (NYSE:FTV).
